description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a dark blue fabric with a subtle geometric circular pattern. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, both in the same patterned fabric. Two light lavender throw pillows are placed at each end, adding a touch of contrast and comfort. The armrests are wide, slightly flared, and padded, providing a contemporary look and additional support. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the height of the armrests, and the sofa stands on four short, block-style wooden legs. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark blue, patterned two-seater sofa with wide, flared armrests, two seat and back cushions, and light lavender throw pillows. It stands on four short wooden legs and features a modern, comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat and back cushions, and both lavender throw pillows resting against the armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the profile of the flared armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, patterned backrest and the tops of the throw pillows peeking above the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest profile, cushion depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size, with two loose throw pillows at each end.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded, slightly flared armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and covered in the same patterned fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, made of wood with a dark brown finish and exposed beneath the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, matching the armrest height, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Dark blue fabric with a subtle geometric circular pattern, providing a textured and visually interesting surface.
